user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the asset notification templates list, so that I can see which asset in-app notifications are configured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Notification Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns Template Type ID, Notification type, Description and Task

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view a specific asset notification template such as Asset Assignment Notification, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the asset notification templates are listed; When I click View on a row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the asset notification templates list, so that I see the latest configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch to the Email Templates view for assets, so that I can manage both channels
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Notification Templates screen; When I select the Email Templates tab; Then the email templates are shown
